creator: mfoacs@gmail.com
text:
It seems that I am facing the same issue with a fresh install of 14.2-RELEASE.

A Ryzen 7 78003XD with a RX 7900XTX working well with 14.1-RELEASE. I had to reinstall because of storage space, so I took the opportunity to upgrade to 14.2-RELEASE from a clean slate.

Likewise, I have compiled drm-61-kmod and the firmware modules from ports, and yet, the issue persists.

Firmware for the device should be one of: psp_13_0_10: gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-psp-13-0-10 or psp_13_0_11: gpu-firmware-amd-kmod-psp-13-0-11, but based on your experience, some other should also be present. 

What is the correct way to identify what's missing?

System is now FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE-p1, freshly installed and updated.
